app.title: PBQ — Personality Belief Questionnaire
app.subtitle: Please read the statements below and rate how much you believe each one. Try to judge how you feel about each statement most of the time.
app.attribution: © 1995 Aaron T. Beck, M.D. and Judith S. Beck, Ph.D. This web version is a study/self-reflection aid; it is not a diagnostic instrument.

scaleQuestion: How much do you believe it?

scaleLegend.title: Rating scale
scaleLegend.instructions: Choose the number that best matches how you feel about the statement most of the time.

ratings.label: I don't believe it at all

validation.answerAll: Please answer every question before submitting.

results.title: Your PBQ scale scores
results.intro: Each scale sums 14 belief items (0–4 each) for a maximum of 56 per scale. The Borderline scale is a subset of items and shares them with other scales. Z-scores compare your raw score against a sample of 756 psychiatric outpatients — they are informational, not diagnostic.
results.disclaimer: This tool is intended for education and self-reflection. It does not diagnose a personality disorder. If any of these results resonate strongly or cause distress, please consult a licensed mental-health professional.
